evidence.content: Men's Carbon Racing Shoe KD900X LD

Ready to break records? The new KD900X LD racing shoe features VFOAM PLUS foam and a carbon plate, making marathons truly enjoyable! Developed in collaboration with elite athletes for long-distance competition. [Co-developed with Professional Athletes] In 2022, Yoann Kowal—a top runner from the Kiprun team—aimed to run his first marathon in London. Leveraging his 15 years of elite-level expertise, our design team achieved a technical breakthrough in just a few months—delivering exceptional dynamism, cushioning, and lightness. This collaboration resulted in a record-breaking racing shoe. [Winning Formula: Cushioning & Dynamism] The KD900X LD combines VFOAM PLUS foam and a carbon plate to enhance propulsion and cushioning. Its arched sole provides flexibility and energy return with every stride. VFOAM PLUS delivers outstanding energy response, maximizing your potential on every run—absorbing impact while delivering explosive power for faster, longer runs. [Tested & Approved by International Athletes] Athletes wearing the KD900X LD have shattered personal records. Bravin Kiptoo clocked 27:02 in the Madrid 10K—tying Haile Gebrselassie’s legendary time and ranking 11th all-time. French athlete Méline Rollin placed 18th at the 2023 World Half Marathon Championships in Riga with a time of 1:10:35. [Lightweight Design for Peak Performance] R&D confirmed that lighter footwear reduces energy expenditure, leading to better running times. While optimizing for weight, we never compromised comfort—selecting the lightest materials and refining outsole design. The result: the Kiprun KD900X LD weighs just 206 g (size 265 mm)—10% lighter than the previous KD900X model. [Drop] 4 mm [Warranty] 2 years
All Sports > Running > Men > Running Shoes > Road Running/Jogging

French athlete Méline Rollin placed 18th at the 2023 World Half Marathon Championships in Riga with a time of 1:10:35. [Lightweight Design for Peak Performance] R&D confirmed that lighter footwear reduces energy expenditure, leading to better running times. While optimizing for weight, we never compromised comfort—selecting the lightest materials and refining outsole design. The result: the Kiprun KD900X LD weighs just 206 g (size 265 mm)—10% lighter than the previous KD900X model. [Drop] 4 mm [Warranty] 2 years 8801426 left_focus images/8801426/img3.png

Men's Carbon Racing Shoe KD900X LD All Sports > Running > Men > Running Shoes > Road Running/Jogging Ready to break records? The new KD900X LD racing shoe features VFOAM PLUS foam and a carbon plate, making marathons truly enjoyable! Developed in collaboration with elite athletes for long-distance competition. [Co-developed with Professional Athletes] In 2022, Yoann Kowal—a top runner from the Kiprun team—aimed to run his first marathon in London. Leveraging his 15 years of elite-level expertise, our design team achieved a technical breakthrough in just a few months—delivering exceptional dynamism, cushioning, and lightness. This collaboration resulted in a record-breaking racing shoe. [Winning Formula: Cushioning & Dynamism] The KD900X LD combines VFOAM PLUS foam and a carbon plate to enhance propulsion and cushioning. Its arched sole provides flexibility and energy return with every stride. VFOAM PLUS delivers outstanding energy response, maximizing your potential on every run—absorbing impact while delivering explosive power for faster, longer runs. [Tested & Approved by International Athletes] Athletes wearing the KD900X LD have shattered personal records. Bravin Kiptoo clocked 27:02 in the Madrid 10K—tying Haile Gebrselassie’s legendary time and ranking 11th all-time. French athlete Méline Rollin placed 18th at the 2023 World Half Marathon Championships in Riga with a time of 1:10:35. [Lightweight Design for Peak Performance] R&D confirmed that lighter footwear reduces energy expenditure, leading to better running times.
